response.original_title: Las Aventuras de Juan Quín Quín
response.overview: The film recounts the adventures, fortunes, and misfortunes of a peasant who refuses to resign himself to his fate in republican Cuba. The film holds an honorable 12th place in the survey "The best of ICAIC production (1959-2008)" by the Cuban Association of Film Press.
response.title: Las Aventuras de Juan Quín Quín
